extDescription.message: Extract clean article content and export to Markdown, Word, PDF, or TXT while preserving image links.

statusIdle.message: Paste a URL to extract article content

statusExtracted.message: Article extracted. Click Download to export.

statusSuccess.message: Export complete. Check your downloads folder.

statusFormatRequired.message: Please select at least one format

statusHttpRequired.message: Only http or https URLs are supported

statusExtractFailed.message: Failed to extract article. Please try again.

statusNoTabFound.message: Could not find the page in any open tab. Please make sure the page is open in your browser and fully loaded, then try again.

statusDynamicSite.message: This website uses dynamic loading. Please open the page in your browser, wait for it to fully load, then click the extension icon.

statusContentTooShort.message: Extracted content is too short. This may be a paywalled or restricted page.

historyConfirmClear.message: Are you sure you want to clear all download history?

exportImageUnavailable.description: Placeholder when an image cannot be embedded

chatConversationTitle.description: Fallback title for a ChatGPT conversation

chatSharedConversationTitle.description: Fallback title for a shared ChatGPT conversation

geminiConversationTitle.description: Fallback title for a Gemini conversation

grokConversationTitle.description: Fallback title for a Grok conversation

chatRoleUser.description: User role heading in exported ChatGPT conversations

chatRoleAssistant.description: Assistant role heading in exported ChatGPT conversations

chatGptRoleYouSaid.description: User section heading in exported ChatGPT conversations

chatGptRoleAssistantSaid.description: Assistant section heading in exported ChatGPT conversations

geminiRoleYouSaid.description: User section heading in exported Gemini conversations

geminiRoleAssistantSaid.description: Assistant section heading in exported Gemini conversations

grokRoleAssistantSaid.description: Assistant section heading in exported Grok conversations

changelog104Item1.message: Improved conversation export for ChatGPT, Gemini, and Grok.

changelog104Item2.message: Fixed issues with speaker labels, titles, and main content extraction.

changelog104Item3.message: Refined the popup layout and overall visual design.

changelog103Item1.message: Improved extraction reliability for dynamic websites.

changelog103Item2.message: Enhanced Chinese rendering in PDF exports.

changelog103Item3.message: Improved consistency across Markdown, Word, PDF, and TXT exports.

changelog102Item1.message: Fixed table rendering in Markdown exports.

changelog102Item2.message: Improved export stability for complex article layouts.

changelog011Item1.message: Refreshed the popup UI for better readability and usability.

changelog011Item2.message: Fixed image extraction issues and improved dynamic site compatibility.

changelog011Item3.message: Added Chinese and English interface support.

changelog010Item1.message: Initial release of Lite Article Exporter with support for exporting clean article content to Markdown, Word, PDF, and TXT.
